extraction.one_line_summary: MARICHKA Yakub won stage 6 sprint, his fourth consecutive stage victory, maintaining orange jersey despite teammate CARTIER crashing in final 600m.
tactical_patterns: MARICHKA Yakub consistently positioned 3rd-7th wheel with 600m remaining, trusting teammates to deliver rather than leading sprint train early.
Team Beltrami-Triestina maintained sprint leadout dominance despite late-stage attrition from CARTIER crash inside final 600m.
MORINI Nicolas attacked MARICHKA's inside line in finale but faded quickly, revealing sprinters need outside positioning to sustain speed.

rider_signals.MARICHKA Yakub: positive: fourth consecutive stage win demonstrates sprint dominance, but acknowledges uncertainty about defending orange jersey on mountainous final stage
rider_signals.MORINI Nicolas: neutral: strong positioning in finale and consistently placing on podium, but lacks final 50m acceleration to challenge MARICHKA
rider_signals.CARTIER Hugo: negative: crashed inside final 600m while leading breakaway domination efforts, compromising team sprint support
rider_signals.MUSICIAN Anton: positive: moved into fourth in points classification through consistent top-5 placings across stages 5-6
